flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at University of Richmond rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($58.6k → $65.2k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at University of Richmond rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($58.6k → $65.2k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of Richmond fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.8% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at University of Richmond are 45% above the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($76.2k vs $52.7k).
